mapper.select: SELECT * FROM threshold_setting ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM threshold_setting WHERE device_uuid = #{deviceUuid} ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO threshold_setting(device_uuid, v_max, v_min, i_max, t_max, updated_at) VALUES(#{deviceUuid}, #{vMax}, #{vMin}, #{iMax}, #{tMax}, #{updatedAt})
INSERT INTO threshold_setting(device_uuid, v_max, updated_at) VALUES(#{deviceUuid}, #{vMax}, #{updatedAt})
INSERT INTO threshold_setting(device_uuid, v_min, updated_at) VALUES(#{deviceUuid}, #{vMin}, #{updatedAt})
INSERT INTO threshold_setting(device_uuid, i_max, updated_at) VALUES(#{deviceUuid}, #{iMax}, #{updatedAt})
INSERT INTO threshold_setting(device_uuid, t_max, updated_at) VALUES(#{deviceUuid}, #{tMax}, #{updatedAt})
INSERT INTO threshold_setting(device_uuid, v_max, v_min, i_max, t_max, updated_at) VALUES(#{deviceUuid}, #{vMax}, #{vMin}, #{iMax}, #{tMax}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE threshold_setting SET v_max = #{v}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE threshold_setting SET v_min = #{v}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE threshold_setting SET i_max = #{v}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE threshold_setting SET t_max = #{v}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE threshold_setting SET v_max = COALESCE(#{vMax}, v_max), v_min = COALESCE(#{vMin}, v_min), i_max = COALESCE(#{iMax}, i_max), t_max = COALESCE(#{tMax}, t_max), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
